title: Strolid Leadership Call
summary: Thomas Howe dismissed VCON schema questions, offering due diligence expertise for Call Review. Vinnie Micciche noted Call Review due diligence started, with a decision expected in 30 days. Joe Furnari is setting up the data room. Thomas Howe and Sergey Lyapustin will attend the Call Review meeting. Harinder Bhinder confirmed SOC 2 audit target completion by September, delayed by the decision to run two separate audits. Sergey Lyapustin is addressing Sophia AI's awkward silences.

decisions.description: Call Review decision on partnership/acquisition within 30 days.
Thomas Howe and Sergey to attend Call Review meeting.
Joe Furnari to set up data room and prepare financials.
SOC 2 audit target completion set for September.
Run two separate SOC audits for VCON and parent company.

actionItems.task: Harinder to sign auditor contract today.
Harinder to talk to Joe about SOC 2 audit.
Joe to check calendar for Call Review meeting invite.
Sergey to fix Sophia AI awkward silences.
Vinnie to follow up on Call Review meeting invite.

tensions: Thomas Howe dismissed VCON schema questions as a "red herring".
Disagreement on sales presentation approach: Vinnie preferred live demos over Michael's slide deck.
Customer confusion caused by Sophia AI's awkward silences during calls.
Complexity and delay in SOC 2 audit due to decision to run two separate audits.
Potential challenges in migrating AI models (ChatGPT to Claude) due to retesting.

Advocated for live product demonstrations over slide decks for sales.
